description_long: This is a stylized wooden barrel with a slightly bulging midsection, reinforced by two wide, metallic bands studded with rivets. The wood is rendered with a pronounced grain texture, giving it a rugged, weathered appearance. On the side, there is a prominent black graphic of a pirate skull with a bandana and an earring, adding a thematic, decorative touch. The top and bottom surfaces are flat, with the top featuring additional engraved or painted motifs. The metallic bands are painted a dull gray and wrap horizontally around the barrel, providing both structural support and visual contrast. The overall look suggests a container used for storage or transport, likely in an urban or pirate-themed setting.
description: A wooden barrel with metal bands and a pirate skull graphic, featuring a rugged, weathered texture and decorative motifs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pirate skull graphic and both metal bands clearly.
description_view_1: Side view with the wood grain and metal bands visible, but only part of the graphic is seen.
description_view_2: Angled view highlighting the pirate skull graphic and the curvature of the barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with no visible graphic, showing only the wood texture and metal bands.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: metal hoops around midsection and lower third
